name: sayane-extension
description: Sayane Chrome Extension — capture and insert context (Phase 3)

scripts.test: npm run build && node --import tsx --test src/busy-ui.test.ts src/rde-notes.test.ts src/page-diagnostics.test.ts src/manifest-content-bundle.test.ts src/diff-summary.test.ts src/options-notify.test.ts src/capture-input-design.test.ts src/candidate-display.test.ts src/candidate-review-class.test.ts src/merge-policy.test.ts src/sidepanel-candidate-ui.test.ts src/config.test.ts src/sidepanel-client.test.ts src/review-session.test.ts src/capture-excerpt.test.ts src/list-diff.test.ts src/bridge-error-format.test.ts src/candidate-action-state.test.ts src/build-info-display.test.ts src/selection-cache.test.ts src/clipboard-preview.test.ts src/approve-availability.test.ts
scripts.package: npm run clean && npm run build && node scripts/package-extension.mjs
